stemHtml: Choose the statement which best describes the possible effects of initiating take-off without clearing external surfaces of ice (except as permitted in the flight manual). The effects of icing…

options.a: Are potentially significant and dangerous for small aeroplanes but are NOT significant for large transport category aeroplanes.
options.b: Are well understood and in general do NOT negatively affect performance or controllability during take-off.
options.c: Have been accounted for by the aircraft manufacturer so that suitable performance is assured.
options.d: Are wide-ranging, unpredictable and dependent on the individual aeroplane design.
